_meta.description: Ground-truth bytecode-level findings for DIVA APK based on manual analysis and MobSF Dynamic+Static comparison.

expected_absent_pattern_ids.reason: DIVA does not use encryption at all
DIVA does not perform network communication

summary.notes: DIVA focuses on insecure data storage and input validation. Bytecode findings center on SharedPreferences, SQLite, and logging.
